sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَتْ مَيْسُونُ مِنَ الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ كَرِيمًا لِلْجِلْدِ الْجَافِّ.
sentences.translation: Mejsun je iz apoteke kupila kremu za suhu kožu.
sentences.translationEn: Maysoun bought a cream for dry skin from the pharmacy.

sentences.translation: Pitala je farmaceutkinju koja vrsta je najbolja.
sentences.translationEn: She asked the pharmacist about the best type.

sentences.arabic: نَصَحَتْهَا الصَّيْدَلَانِيَّةُ بِكَرِيمٍ طَبِيعِيٍّ بِدُونِ كِيمِيَاوِيَّاتٍ.
sentences.translation: Farmaceutkinja joj je savjetovala prirodnu kremu bez hemikalija.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist advised her a natural cream without chemicals.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَخْدَمَتْ مَيْسُونُ الْكَرِيمَ بَعْدَ الِاسْتِحْمَامِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Mejsun je koristila kremu svaki dan nakon tuširanja.
sentences.translationEn: Maysoun used the cream every day after showering.
